description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find the location offering the highest listed price per pound for aluminum cans and submit a contact form asking about that location’s weekend drop-off hours.
tasks.name: Find the location offering the highest listed price per pound for aluminum cans and submit a contact form asking about that location’s weekend drop-off hours.
tasks.description: Find the location offering the highest listed price per pound for aluminum cans and submit a contact form asking about that location’s weekend drop-off hours.

tasks.instruction: Book a residential pickup for a single refrigerator in ZIP 30309 using the earliest available morning time window and complete the booking request.
tasks.name: Book a residential pickup for a single refrigerator in ZIP 30309 using the earliest available morning time window and complete the booking request.
tasks.description: Book a residential pickup for a single refrigerator in ZIP 30309 using the earliest available morning time window and complete the booking request.

tasks.instruction: Use the pricing calculator to compare total payout for 500 pounds of copper wire between on-site pickup and yard drop-off, then request a quote using whichever option shows the higher total payout.
tasks.name: Use the pricing calculator to compare total payout for 500 pounds of copper wire between on-site pickup and yard drop-off, then request a quote using whichever option shows the higher total payout.
tasks.description: Use the pricing calculator to compare total payout for 500 pounds of copper wire between on-site pickup and yard drop-off, then request a quote using whichever option shows the higher total payout.

tasks.instruction: In the container rental flow for ZIP 85004, choose the cheapest available 20-yard scrap metal dumpster for a 10-day rental, or if no 20-yard options appear choose two of the cheapest 10-yard dumpsters instead, and submit the booking request.
tasks.name: In the container rental flow for ZIP 85004, choose the cheapest available 20-yard scrap metal dumpster for a 10-day rental, or if no 20-yard options appear choose two of the cheapest 10-yard dumpsters instead, and submit the booking request.

tasks.instruction: From the non-ferrous materials guide, identify three distinct copper materials priced above $2.00 per pound and add them with estimated weights of 10, 15, and 20 pounds to a drop-off planning tool before submitting your plan.
tasks.name: From the non-ferrous materials guide, identify three distinct copper materials priced above $2.00 per pound and add them with estimated weights of 10, 15, and 20 pounds to a drop-off planning tool before submitting your plan.

tasks.instruction: For a small manufacturing business, select a recycling plan in the manufacturing category that costs under $200 per month and includes monthly scheduled pickups, then complete the program signup form.
tasks.name: For a small manufacturing business, select a recycling plan in the manufacturing category that costs under $200 per month and includes monthly scheduled pickups, then complete the program signup form.
tasks.description: For a small manufacturing business, select a recycling plan in the manufacturing category that costs under $200 per month and includes monthly scheduled pickups, then complete the program signup form.

tasks.instruction: Find a blog article about hazardous or restricted metal items, choose one metal-related item mentioned there, and submit a contact form asking specifically about recycling that item using a subject related to hazardous materials.

target_names: Hazardous Scrap Metal Items That Need Special Handling

tasks.instruction: Use the payout calculator to estimate the total payout for 200 pounds of steel beams and 50 pounds of aluminum siding, then choose PayPal as the payment method if it is offered, otherwise choose Check, and submit the estimate request.

tasks.instruction: Find an active first-time customer promotion that applies to drop-off visits, then book a drop-off appointment at the main yard for next Saturday in a time window between 12:00 PM and 3:00 PM, applying the corresponding promo code during booking.
